name: Project Summary
description: Generate a comprehensive overview of the current project

input.command: cat package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("Name:",d.get("name")); print("Deps:",len(d.get("dependencies",{}))); print("DevDeps:",len(d.get("devDependencies",{})))' 2>/dev/null || cat requirements.txt 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo '{} Python deps' || echo 'No deps file'
echo 'Commits:'; git rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '?'; echo 'Contributors:'; git shortlog -sn --no-merges 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo 'Last 5 commits:'; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null
echo 'Lines of code:'; find . -name '*.py' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.go' -o -name '*.rs' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1
